name: Nextcloud Files
description: Manage files on a Nextcloud instance via WebDAV — list, read, write, upload (binary via file_ref), move, and delete files and folders

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List files and folders in a directory

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the text content of a file

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Create or overwrite a file with text content

tools.name: upload_file
tools.description: Upload a binary file (PDF, image, etc.) to Nextcloud from a file_ref or external URL

tools.name: download_file
tools.description: Download a file from Nextcloud and prepare it for sending to the user

tools.name: upload_from_url
tools.description: Download a file from a URL and save it to Nextcloud

tools.name: move_file
tools.description: Move or rename a file or folder

author: freddy-schuetz
